Amount of joining time :—(1) Not more than one day‘s joining lime shall be allowed to an ofliccr of employee to join :-. new post within.thc same station or an post which does not involve changc of residence from one station to another. Combination with Vacation z—Joining Lime may be combined with vacation and/or regular leave of any kind or duration except‘casnal lenvc. lot When Transfer Orders are modified z—lf an employee in transit it directed to proceed to a place’ dillcrcnt from that indicated in the initial transit); orders, he shall be entitled to joining time already availed of uplo the dnto of receipt of,the revised ,ortlcrs plus! a fresh Spell of full Joining time' from the date following the date oi receipt of the revised 0 d . The fresh spell of joining time in such c shall be calculated from the place at which he received the revised orders as it' he was transferred from that place to the new place of postiu". ll. Joining Time Pay and Allowances : An employee on joining time shall be regarded as on duty during that,pcriod and shall, be entitled to be paid joining time pay equal to the pay which was drawn before relinquishment of charge 'in the old post, He shall be entitled to Dcamess Allow— ances, it any, appropriate to the joining time pay. .Ctllllpcr]<ltlt)l‘y allowance like City Compensatory Allowance, [louse Rent Allowance as applicable in the old station from» which he was transferred but he shall not be entitled toeonvcynncc allowance orr permanent travelling allowance for the period of joining limo awaited by him NEELAM ’NATH, Member (F&A) w Delhi-l 10064 1 5‘96 -- 4 of 4 --
